text.title: aws-ec2-provisioning Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for aws-ec2-provisioning as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Allowing 0.0.0.0/0 on SSH port 22 in any security group.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Exposes instances to brute-force and credential-stuffing attacks from the entire internet. Use SSM Session Manager for management access instead.
